CONTENT.Club career: Langkamp made his professional debut on 1 March 2009 in a Bundesliga match against VfB Stuttgart while playing at Karlsruher SC.On his third appearance for Karlsruher SC, an away match against Bayer Leverkusen, Langkamp scored a 50-yard sliding tackle goal which some consider to be one of the most memorable goals in Bundesliga history.He moved to Hertha BSC from FC Augsburg to play in the 2013–14 Fußball-Bundesliga.In January 2018, Langkamp joined Werder Bremen.Perth Glory announced that they had signed Langkamp on a two-year deal in January 2021. After overcoming injury, Mr. Langkamp made his debut for Perth Glory in a 2-0 Round 15 loss to Macarthur FC in which he conceded a penalty.
CONTENT.External links: Sebastian Langkamp at DFB (also available in German)Sebastian Langkamp at fussballdaten.de (in German)Sebastian Langkamp at KSC.de (in German)

SUMMARY:
Sebastian Langkamp (born 15 January 1988) is a German professional footballer who last played as a defender for Perth Glory in the Australian A-League.
His brother Matthias Langkamp is also a professional footballer.
